title: cmp_tbdata: Text file busy test error on arm64
body:
The haphazard compilation of cmp_tbdata as part of tests/tools/autotest.sh is racy. I'm seeing this error on arm64, it's plain to see that multiple gcc's are kicked off concurrently which likely triggers this:

```
cd tests/simple && bash run-test.sh ""
make[3]: Entering directory '/<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/simple'
+ gcc -Wall -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/<<PKGBUILDDIR>>=. -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fstack-protector-strong -fstack-clash-protection -Wformat -Werror=format-security -mbranch-protection=standard -o /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata.c
+ gcc -Wall -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/<<PKGBUILDDIR>>=. -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fstack-protector-strong -fstack-clash-protection -Wformat -Werror=format-security -mbranch-protection=standard -o /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata.c
+ gcc -Wall -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/<<PKGBUILDDIR>>=. -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fstack-protector-strong -fstack-clash-protection -Wformat -Werror=format-security -mbranch-protection=standard -o /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata.c
+ gcc -Wall -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/<<PKGBUILDDIR>>=. -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fstack-protector-strong -fstack-clash-protection -Wformat -Werror=format-security -mbranch-protection=standard -o /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata.c
Test: case_expr_query -> ERROR!
Note: Make sure that 'iverilog' is an up-to-date git checkout of Icarus Verilog.
case_expr_query: + body
case_expr_query: + cd case_expr_query.out
case_expr_query: ++ basename case_expr_query.sv
case_expr_query: + fn=case_expr_query.sv
case_expr_query: ++ basename case_expr_query
case_expr_query: + bn=case_expr_query
case_expr_query: + refext=v
case_expr_query: + rm -f case_expr_query_ref.fir

case_expr_query: + [[ sv == \a\i\g ]]
case_expr_query: + [[ sv == \a\a\g ]]

case_expr_query: + false
case_expr_query: + /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata case_expr_query_out_ref case_expr_query_out_syn0
case_expr_query: ../tools/autotest.sh: line 178: /<<PKGBUILDDIR>>/tests/tools/cmp_tbdata: Text file busy
make[3]: *** [../tools/autotest.mk:10: case_expr_query.sv] Error 1
```

I add a simple `flock` to the compilation command to fix this but probably this should be done at the Makefile level instead. I'd simply always compile cmp_tbdata as part of the redular build so the run-test.sh can still be run manually without taking care of compiling the helper first.

--Daniel
